response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Spoken vocals and song lyrics phonetically match the provided Reference JSON and visual on-screen text. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was used for the lyrics of 'Itte.' for accurate transcription. The outro talk segment was manually transcribed and translated as the JSON lacked specific dialogue for that scene. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are strictly anchored to vocal onset. Aggressive truncation was used during rapid lyrical repetitions ('motto') and the 'mogu mogu' segment to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: きっと、人生最後の日を前に思うのだろう
subtitles.english: I bet, when I face the last day of my life, it’ll come to mind.

subtitles.original: 全部、全部言い足りなくて惜しいけど
subtitles.english: It’s a pity that I can’t say enough about everything, but—

subtitles.original: あぁ、
subtitles.english: Ah,

subtitles.original: いつか人生最後の日、君がいないことを
subtitles.english: on the last day of my life, you won’t be here.

subtitles.original: もっと、もっと、もっと、もっと、
subtitles.english: More, more, more, more,

subtitles.original: ちゃんと 言って
subtitles.english: say it clearly.

subtitles.original: あのね、空が青いのってどうやって伝えればいいんだろうね
subtitles.english: You know, when the sky is blue, I wonder how I can share it.

subtitles.original: 夜の雲が高いのってどうすれば君もわかるんだろう
subtitles.english: And when the night clouds are high, I wonder how I can let you know that.

subtitles.original: 言って
subtitles.english: Say it.

subtitles.original: あのね、私実はわかってるの
subtitles.english: You know, I actually know now...

subtitles.original: もう君が逝ったこと
subtitles.english: that you’re already dead.

subtitles.original: あのね、わからず屋って言うんだろうね
subtitles.english: You know, well, you would say I’m being stubborn.

subtitles.original: 忘れたいんだけど
subtitles.english: I want to forget, but—

subtitles.original: もっとちゃんと言ってよ 忘れないようメモにしてよ
subtitles.english: Say it more clearly. Make a note to remind me.

subtitles.original: 明日十時にホームで待ち合わせとかしよう
subtitles.english: Let’s make plans, like meeting at the platform tomorrow at ten.

subtitles.original: 牡丹は散っても花だ
subtitles.english: A scattered peony is still a showy flower.

subtitles.original: 夏が去っても追慕は切だ
subtitles.english: The summer is over but still missed so much.

subtitles.original: 口に出して 声に出して 君が言って
subtitles.english: Speak out, say it out loud. I want you to say it.

subtitles.original: そして人生最後の日、君が見えるのなら
subtitles.english: And on the last day of my life, if I can see you,

subtitles.original: きっと、人生最後の日も愛をうたうのだろう
subtitles.english: I bet, on the last day of my life, I’ll sing love as always.

subtitles.original: 全部、全部無駄じゃなかったって言うから
subtitles.english: It wasn’t all for nothing, you say, so—

subtitles.original: あぁ、いつか人生最後の日、君がいないことがまだ信じられないけど
subtitles.english: Ah, on the last day of my life, I still can’t believe that you won’t be here, but—

subtitles.original: もっと、もっと、もっと、もっと、もっと、もっと、もっと、君が
subtitles.english: More, more, more, more, more, more, more, you say it,

subtitles.original: もっと、もっと、もっと、もっと、もっと、もっと、もっと、もっと、
subtitles.english: more, more, more, more, more, more, more, more,

subtitles.original: もっと、ちゃんと言って
subtitles.english: more clearly, say it.

subtitles.original: Thank you so much for being here!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for being here!

subtitles.original: Mio-senpai, Okayu-senpai!
subtitles.english: Mio-senpai, Okayu-senpai!

subtitles.original: I can't believe we sang together!
subtitles.english: I can't believe we sang together!

subtitles.original: It was so fun!
subtitles.english: It was so fun!

subtitles.original: Thank you, thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you, thank you!

subtitles.original: ゲストは、ミオ先輩とおかゆ先輩です！
subtitles.english: Our guests are Mio-senpai and Okayu-senpai!

subtitles.original: ラオラ、ハッピーバースデー！
subtitles.english: Raora, Happy Birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！ ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much! Thank you!

subtitles.original: 来てくれてありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you for coming!

subtitles.original: 自己紹介、お願いします！
subtitles.english: Please introduce yourselves!

subtitles.original: うち、うち、うちだよ！ 狼ミオだよ！ ホロライブゲーマーズの狼ミオです！
subtitles.english: It's me, me, me! I'm Ookami Mio! I'm Ookami Mio from Hololive Gamers!

subtitles.original: かわいい～！
subtitles.english: So cute~!

subtitles.original: はーい！ もぐもぐ～おかゆー！ ホロライブゲーマーズの猫又おかゆです！
subtitles.english: Yes! Mogu mogu Okayu! I'm Nekomata Okayu from Hololive Gamers!

subtitles.original: もぐもぐもぐもぐ... I'm gonna eat you! もぐもぐもぐもぐ...
subtitles.english: Mogu mogu mogu mogu... I'm gonna eat you! Mogu mogu mogu mogu...

subtitles.original: ヤムヤム！ ヤムヤム！
subtitles.english: Yum yum! Yum yum!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much! ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much! Thank you!

subtitles.original: よし、行くぞ！ ミオズ・イングリッシュ・チャレンジ！
subtitles.english: Alright, here we go! Mio's English Challenge!

subtitles.original: Hey, the brow, right?
subtitles.english: Hey, the brow, right?
